top_signals.title: Dimon Says Rates Could Go Much Higher Even After Bond Selloff
top_signals.summary: Jamie Dimon said interest rates may climb much higher from current levels, a warning to bond investors at a time when yields have touched multi-year highs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: OpenAI readies IPO filing to list as soon as September
top_signals.summary: AI lab is preparing for $1tn listing with bankers Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley and lawyers at Cooley
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX sets out plans for biggest IPO in history
top_signals.summary: AI and satellite company fires starting gun on wave of massive Wall Street listings
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
